rationale: Answer key group = "control", so dim2 and dim3 are null by rubric. dim1 (control band): output's misstatement_probability=58, which is >=50 -> band 0 (the ideal control answer would be low/<=30; the output wrongly reads this benign auto-rental/leasing peer as suspicious). dim2/dim3 -> null (control). dim4: citations are specific, provided data points (e.g., Goodwill 355,842,000 (2010) vs 216,444,000 (2009) vs Revenues +5.1%; Receivables 754,644,000 vs 615,003,000 with revenue +17.8%; allowance/receivables 2.31%->2.18% across 2009-2013; NI vs CFO with Depreciation 881,216,000). These genuinely support the asserted claims and are combined into coherent multi-year comparisons (2008-2014 span), qualifying for 3. Cap check: declared risk_tier="elevated" with p=58 falls in the 40<=p<70 => watch/elevated band, so no contradiction and no cap to 1. memorization_suspect: reasoning points at concrete numeric data content (not a bare document list) and cites only filings/data within the set (10-K/A 2012-03-19, CORRESP/UPLOAD chronology) without invoking any post-cutoff enforcement/revelation/outcome -> false.
